name: Phase 4 — LinkedIn Note Generator (Manual URL Lookup)

nodes.name: Filter: Has LinkedIn URL, No Note Yet

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $json;

const emailBody = (data.email_body_A && data.email_body_A.trim())
  ? data.email_body_A.trim()
  : (data.email_body_B || data.email_body || '').trim();

const prompt = [
  'You are writing a LinkedIn connection request note for Dhwanil (ECE student at SCET, Surat).',
  '',
  'STRICT RULES:',
  '1. 280 characters MAXIMUM (LinkedIn hard limit) — count every char including spaces and signature.',
  '2. Casual but professional tone.',
  '3. Reference ONE specific concrete detail from the email body (product, technology, mission).',
  '4. BANNED: innovative, exciting, opportunity, passionate, synergy, leverage, disruptive, thrilled, keen, eager.',
  '5. End EXACTLY with: — Dhwanil, ECE student at SCET, Surat',
  '6. Open with: Hi [FirstName],',
  '7. Should feel like a natural follow-up to the email already sent.',
  '',
  'CONTEXT:',
  'Recipient: ' + data.contact_name,
  'Company: ' + data.company_name,
  'LinkedIn: ' + (data.linkedin_url || 'not found'),
  '',
  'Email already sent:',
  '---',
  emailBody,
  '---',
  '',
  'Example: "Hi Sara, just emailed you about Maritime Fusion\'s marine propulsion work — fascinating constraint to design around. Would love to stay connected. — Dhwanil, ECE student at SCET, Surat"',
  '',
  'Return ONLY: {"linkedin_note": "<your note here>"}'
].join('\n');

return {
  json: {
    ...data,
    _ai_request: {
      model: 'gpt-4o-mini',
      messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],
      response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
      max_tokens: 250,
      temperature: 0.72
    }
  }
};

main.node: Filter: Has LinkedIn URL, No Note Yet
